emails.subject: Citigroup
emails.body: Citigroup Just talked to Leslie Reeves about the meeting today. Did I miss something? Did we ever talk about a presentation around readiness for a January 20th implimetation? Maybe I missed something or it went to the other Bob Hall. After the holidays, I would like to get in your calendar and discuss how Operations gets included more upfront. thanks bob

emails.subject: RE: Citigroup
emails.body: RE: Citigroup Oh oh I suppose it all went to the other Bob. I thought you were Robert L Hall Jr
